summary: Comprehensive testing of GOVERN.AI Step 2A implementation completed successfully. Tested JWT authentication with RBAC (4 role hierarchy: admin>dpo>auditor>viewer), ARIA verticalized AI assistant with message validation, rate limiting, and all dashboard pages with authenticated requests.
passed_tests: POST /api/auth/login with admin/AdminGovern2026! returns JWT token + user object
POST /api/auth/login with wrong password returns 401
GET /api/auth/me with valid token returns user info
GET /api/dashboard/stats WITHOUT token returns 401
GET /api/dashboard/stats WITH admin token returns KPI data
GET /api/agents WITH admin token returns agent list
POST /api/agents with admin token creates agent (admin has dpo+ permission)
DELETE /api/agents/{id} with admin token works (admin only)
POST /api/agents with invalid enum risk_level='banana' returns 422
GET /api/policies WITH token returns policy list
GET /api/audit WITH token returns audit logs with search/filter
GET /api/compliance WITH token returns 6 compliance standards
POST /api/chat with message < 5 chars returns 400 'Message too short'
POST /api/chat with message > 2000 chars returns 400 'Message too long'
POST /api/chat with valid compliance question returns ARIA response
Frontend: /login page renders with username/password fields and Sign In button
Frontend: Login with admin/AdminGovern2026! navigates to /dashboard
Frontend: Dashboard sidebar shows username 'admin' and role badge 'ADMIN'
Frontend: Logout button in sidebar works and redirects to /login
Frontend: Accessing /dashboard without login redirects to /login
Frontend: ARIA assistant page shows 'ARIA' title and 'AI Regulatory Intelligence Assistant' badge
Frontend: Chat input shows character counter (X/2000)
Frontend: All dashboard pages load with authenticated requests (Overview, Agents, Policies, Audit, Compliance)
